vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc thị giác (thứ gì đó rất đẹp để ngắm nhìn)
vocab.example: The curated collection of Impressionist paintings was a total feast for the eyes.

vocab.meaning: kích hoạt sự sáng tạo, khơi nguồn cảm hứng
vocab.example: Whenever I feel stuck in my work, visiting a modern art gallery really gets my creative juices flowing.

vocab.meaning: làm mới tâm trí, xua tan sự mệt mỏi/uể oải
vocab.example: A quick trip to the local museum is a great way to blow the cobwebs away after a long week of repetitive tasks.
Exhibitions that showcase ancient civilizations truly help to broaden the mind and foster cultural empathy.
I love museums because they house artifacts that have managed to stand the test of time for centuries.

vocab.meaning: khác xa hoàn toàn với cái gì
vocab.example: Seeing an original sculpture in person is a far cry from just looking at a grainy photograph in a textbook.

vocab.meaning: có sẵn ngay trước mắt, dễ dàng tiếp cận
vocab.example: In a well-organized museum, thousands of years of human history are right there at your fingertips.

vocab.meaning: thỏa mãn mọi tiêu chuẩn/yêu cầu
vocab.example: For a perfect weekend activity, an interactive art science museum usually ticks all the boxes for me.

vocab.word: leave a lot to be desired
vocab.meaning: còn nhiều thiếu sót, chưa được như ý (dùng để nhận xét tiêu cực)
vocab.example: While the artifacts were interesting, the lighting in the gallery left a lot to be desired.

vocab.meaning: tốt nhất, không ai sánh bằng
vocab.example: The quality of the historical archives in that particular museum is second to none in this region.
